text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Faster... I need to be faster... I'll never beat
Suzuka at this rate!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm beginning to sense a dangerous aura about
Air Groove during our recent training sessions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling her determination to surpass
Silence Suzuka is pushing her to risky extremes.
choice_data_list:
(I need to think of some way to get her to
relax...)

(I need to think of some way to get her to
relax...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just then, it occurs to me that I haven't been to a
shrine yet this year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove chewed me out last year about not
having any holiday spirit. She'll definitely bite if I
mention this to her.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What are you staring at? Do you have something
to say about my running?
choice_data_list:
I was just thinking about how I haven't been to a
shrine yet this year...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: No... It can't be... How could I let this happen?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Air Groove is way more flustered than I imagined!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I knew these things meant a lot to her, but can she really be this horrified on my behalf?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: HOW HAVE I NOT GONE YET?!
choice_data_list: ...Wait, you too?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'll never forgive myself! I was so caught up in
training that I almost let this celebration pass me
by!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Why are you just standing there?! We're leaving right this second!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I never imagined Air Groove would have
forgotten, but it was a happy miscalculation. This
should present a good chance for her to relax.
We get ready and head out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove and I finish giving our respects at a
local shrine.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This doesn't happen often, but I must thank you.
If weren't for your reminder, I would've
completely forgotten about it.
choice_data_list: You're very welcome.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... This is clear proof of negligence on my
part!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I need to up my game! Otherwise, I'm never going
to beat Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Okay. Let's hurry back. Time is precious, and I
need to spend it training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I start to panic. I need to nip this in the bud
before things get out of hand. But how am I going
to get her to take the whole day off?
choice_data_list: Why don't we have some New Year's food?
Why don't we have some New Year's food?

Let's write "I want to get stronger" on a prayer
tablet!
Let's get a fortune slip!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I start to panic. I need to nip this in the bud
before things get out of hand. But how am I going
to get her to take the whole day off?
choice_data_list: Why don't we have some New Year's food?
Why don't we have some New Year's food?

Let's write "I want to get stronger" on a prayer
tablet!
Let's get a fortune slip!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Did you even listen to what I just said? We
haven't a moment to lose!
choice_data_list:
So you're just going to ignore the New Year's
season?

So you're just going to ignore the New Year's
season?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I suppose a shrine visit alone isn't enough to
constitute a proper New Year's celebration...
choice_data_list:
You know how important it is to show some
holiday spirit!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you're using my own words against
me...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Fine, I surrender. My lifestyle may indeed have
been lacking in balance of late.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Let's eat something seasonal before we head
back. Any ideas?
choice_data_list: How about mochi soup?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Is that the only New Year's food you know?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove and I get some mochi soup before
heading back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to have loosened up a bit. I think the
time off did her some good.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
"I want to get stronger?" As always, your phrasing
needs some work. Besides, I don't have time to
waste on—
choice_data_list: Do you not write prayer tablets for New Year's?
Do you not write prayer tablets for New Year's?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ngh.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Actually, I usually do.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Writing out my goals is an effective way to
heighten my awareness of them.
choice_data_list: So what are we waiting for?
So what are we waiting for?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I suppose you're right. But let's make this quick.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to retract my earlier statement. I may have
been more... on edge lately than I realized.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's get to it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: So tell me. What are you going to write?
choice_data_list:
"I hope Air Groove becomes the greatest racer
of all time."

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You moron... Could you have phrased that any
more poorly?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove and I discuss how to best write our
wishes on the wooden prayer tablets.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we chat, I notice her expression growing less
strained. I let out a sigh of relief.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Did you even listen to a word I said? I told you
time is of the essence.
choice_data_list:
But a shrine visit isn't complete without a
fortune.

But a shrine visit isn't complete without a
fortune.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I don't... entirely disagree.
choice_data_list:
Don't you want to celebrate this holiday
properly?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I hate that you're using my own words
against me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Fine.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'll placate you just this once. What are you
standing around for? Come on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove's fortune reads, "You are rushing
forward with little regard for your health. Find
time to relax."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove takes the words to heart, resolving to
focus on the training she really needs to do rather
than recklessly racking up session after session.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This shift in focus helps to relieve the excessive
pressure she had been feeling, leading her back
to the path of efficiency.
